anchor.heading: Technical Context
anchor.blockText:
**Language/Version**: TypeScript 5.3+ (ES2022, strict mode)
**Primary Dependencies**: VS Code Extension API (`@types/vscode ^1.84.0`), Preact (webview signals)
**Storage**: File-based — `reviewComments[]` field in `.spec-context.json` per spec directory
**Testing**: Jest + ts-jest (`npm test`). BDD `describe`/`it` style; VS Code mocked via `tests/__mocks__/vscode.ts`
**Target Platform**: VS Code extension (Node.js extension host + browser webview context)
**Project Type**: Single VS Code extension with a split extension/webview build
**Performance Goals**: N/A (two-line logic fix, no new I/O)
**Constraints**: Must not change `ReviewCommentDoc` type or `.spec-context.json` schema
**Scale/Scope**: 2 files changed, ≤ 10 lines total
